selected_question.question: What is the earliest plausible timeframe in which artificial general intelligence (AGI) will achieve reliable human-level autonomous decision-making in high-stakes contexts?
selected_question.why_it_matters: Knowing this timeline impacts investment, regulation, and safety preparations for transformative AI technologies.

selected_score.rationale: AGI timeline is critical for safety and policy; high uncertainty; actionable for regulation and investment; novel due to rapid AI advances; falsifiable by observing deployment.

all_scores.rationale: AGI timeline is critical for safety and policy; high uncertainty; actionable for regulation and investment; novel due to rapid AI advances; falsifiable by observing deployment.
Quantum internet impacts security and geopolitics; technological feasibility uncertain; actionable for R&D and policy; moderately novel; falsifiable by deployment status.
Geopolitical stability affects global cooperation; uncertainty moderate; less directly actionable; question is broad and less novel; falsifiable but complex.
Digital democracy affects governance and trust; uncertainty moderate; actionable for platform design and policy; somewhat novel; falsifiable via polarization metrics.
AI automation impacts labor markets globally; high importance and uncertainty; actionable for economic policy; moderately novel; falsifiable by labor data.
Universal vaccine platform critical for health security; uncertainty due to scientific challenges; actionable for funding and research; novel; falsifiable by vaccine development.
Net-zero feasibility crucial for climate policy; uncertainty in tech and economics; highly actionable; moderately novel; falsifiable by emission and technology data.
AI-generated media affects culture and economics; moderate importance; uncertainty in adoption rates; actionable for media strategies; novel; falsifiable by market data.
